text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the academy is holding a party as one of
its multiple promotional events.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Look! Rudolf, Maruzen, and even C.B. are here at
this party! What a dream event!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, they'll be running an exhibition
race after this! My heart is racing a mile a minute,
as is my pen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This exhibition race is not one to miss. Just as I'm
thinking of how it'll be a treasure trove for
training reference, someone speaks up next to
me.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh. This night breeze is wonderful. Makes me
want to go for a walk.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hm? I'm going to take a little break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's off before I can properly stop her. The party
will be ruined if one of its main guests is missing. I
have to get her to come back!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Doo dee doo... Oh, that person must be camping
solo. How nice. They've got a portable wood
stove too...
choice_data_list: C.B.! We have to go back to the party!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: You again? Didn't I just see you earlier?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, sorry but my body doesn't feel ready to
go back yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mr. C.B. effortlessly hoists herself over
a bench and slides out of sight down the staircase
handrail.
choice_data_list: Whoa, that was so cool! I mean, wait!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
What? Is it really weird that I eat it this way? I
feel like it's tastier if you take your first bite from
its back, though...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey again. Wow, you sure are sweating.
Decided to get some exercise, huh?
choice_data_list: We have to... go back... to the party...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Sounds like you've worked up a killer
appetite. Well, I can't let you go hungry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shoves a piping hot taiyaki into my mouth
while I'm panting for breath! Its rich sweetness
washes over my tongue...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you dripping sweat is making me want to
go running myself, so that one's on me!
choice_data_list: Thank yo—no, wait! Come back here!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ahhh. This evening breeze is so nice and cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She runs off again in high spirits. I stagger after
her, exhausted from my wild Mr. C.B. chase.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not used to flat-out sprinting after someone,
and my party clothes are ruined from all my
sweat. But despite all that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find myself smiling at the frankly delightful run
and the fact that I just decided to chase after her
without thinking about it at all.
choice_data_list: Yeah... This actually... does feel great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it isn't so bad to be dragged around
willy-nilly by someone so unbarred and full of life.
Just as I finish that thought...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, I got a LANE message from Rudolf... Ah,
it's almost time for the exhibition race.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm all warmed up now, so I guess I should
go.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hey, I'm going to head back now.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Here, you can have this. I bought it as a
refreshment for myself earlier, but I haven't had
any yet.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
You look ready to keel over the way your legs are
wobbling. You should rest a while before you get
moving again.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: I'll see you later! You should come see the race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no keeping up with such caprice! She's off
like a bullet once more, and I trail after her with
tottering steps.
